settings.text: {{ closest.page.title }}

If you are buying 10 or more Dr. Water products, this is where you get better pricing and hands-on support.

We introduced bulk orders after receiving multiple gifting and event requests. Here are a few things CXOs and team leads have already done with Dr. Water products:

  • 475 pitchers ordered by a large community organisation in Florida
  • 400 plus customised bottles for Halsted Financials for employee gifting
Why Teams Choose Dr. Water For Bulk Orders
Thoughtful, health focused gift
Hydrogen water is more than a regular bottle of water. It is a practical gift that people can use daily, with real health benefits when used consistently.
Better experience at events and offices
Participants stay better hydrated, feel more alert, and have something useful to take home at the end of the day.
Your brand stays visible
Custom branded bottles act like small moving billboards. People carry them to the gym, office, and while travelling, so your logo stays in front of them long after the event is over.
Eco friendly and reusable
Reusable bottles cut down on single use plastic. It is an easy way to show that your organisation cares about sustainability, not just convenience.
Use Cases That Make Sense
Corporate teams and offices
Companies give bottles or pitchers to employees as a useful, everyday item that fits well into wellness or benefits programs.
Churches and community groups
Leaders use them for volunteers, staff, and key supporters as a practical thank you gift.
Retail partners
Start with a smaller quantity, see how customers respond, and reorder as needed.
Gyms and studios
Owners buy in bulk because members ask for them, or they want a better option to sell at the front desk or include in premium plans.
Events and retreats
Everyone receives the same branded bottle, which can be customised for the event name, theme, or message.
Product Options People Commonly Choose
Different groups choose different things. Here is what usually works:
For corporate gifting

• HydroStanley, clean look and sturdy for everyday use
  • Add HydroFixx sachets if you want a small extra inside the box
For families or mixed groups
HydroPitcher, easy to keep on a counter and simple for multiple people to use
For welcome kits and employee packs
HydroStanley plus 6 small sachets. Comes across as thoughtful and practical.
For gyms and training centers

• Hydrator Pro for people who train often and want the strongest bottle
  • HydroPitcher in staff rooms or recovery areas
For travel, remote teams, or students
HydroStanley, good for moving around, commuting, and daily use
Branding and Customisation Options
Logo placement
Your logo placed clearly on the bottle so people recognise it at a glance.
Custom packaging
Eco friendly packaging options for conferences, retreats, and gifting. We can share mockups or samples if needed.
Custom message
Option to add a line, event name, or short message that matters to your organisation.
The Tax Angle (Simple Version)

Check with your accountant, but bulk orders often fall under categories like:

  • Employee benefits
  • Client gifts
  • Event supplies
  • Office equipment
  • Gym or studio equipment

Most organisations treat this as a normal business expense instead of a personal purchase.
Why Bulk Pricing Works In Your Favour

When your order is 10 or more units:

  • You get a lower price per unit
  • You can mix different products in one quote
  • You get direct support from our team
  • Timelines and logistics are handled clearly
  • We can help with inserts, simple customisation, or packaging for large orders

It is straightforward and predictable.
Why You Can Trust Dr. Water With A Large Order

If you are placing a serious order, you should feel secure about who you are buying from.

  • We are a U.S. based company with a real team behind the products
  • Tens of thousands of customers use Dr. Water products
  • We have already fulfilled several large bulk orders for conferences and gifting
  • Our products are tested and designed for long term use
  • We back everything with warranty and after support
  • We respond quickly with real human support

You will always know who you are dealing with.
Want A Quote?
If you are considering 10 or more units, fill out the form below. We will get back to you with a clear quote and simple next steps.
